entries.title: The League Is Exhausted Before Deika

continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The League of Villains enters this arc hungry, sleep-deprived, under-resourced, and pressured by Gigantomachia and the MLA.
content.injection: Before Deika, write the League as dangerous but strained. They are not yet a vast army with secure infrastructure.

entries.title: Meta Liberation Ideology Frames Quirk Suppression As Oppression

context.label: Giran is kidnapped by the Meta Liberation Army

content.fact: Before his breakthrough, Twice’s fear that he might be a clone prevents him from freely duplicating himself at full scale.
